dealSummary: German laser fusion startup Focused Energy raised a $240 million Series A from investors including RWE, SPRIND and Prime Movers Lab.
AI insurance startup Corgi secured a $106 million round led by TCV at a $2.6 billion valuation.

company: Garner Health, whose platform helps patients find healthcare providers
dealSummary: Garner Health, whose platform helps patients find healthcare providers, raised a $100 million Series E led by Index Ventures.
Observable Space, a startup developing optical telescopes for satellite navigation and communication, raised a $90 million round led by Lux Capital.
London-based industrial hardware specialist Orbital Industries secured a $50 million Series B led by Plural.
AI data infrastructure startup Daloopa received a $47 million Series C led by Brighton Park Capital.
Canals, which offers a platform for industrial supply chain distribution workflows, raised a $35 million round led by Base10 Partners.
Saris, the developer of a workflow automation platform for banks and credit unions, secured a $28.8 million Series A led by 8VC.
